parameters.query: UPDATE "user_list" SET "username" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.nama).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "username"), "NIP" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "NIP"), "no" = COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ ($json.no).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), 'null')::numeric, "no"), "Jabatan" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.jabatan).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "Jabatan"), "bidang" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.bidang).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "bidang"), "Status" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.status).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "Status"), "pangkat" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.pangkat).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "pangkat"), "nomorhp" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.nomorhp).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "nomorhp"), "role" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.role).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "role"), "instansi_id" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.instansi_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "instansi_id") WHERE "id" = '{{ ($json.id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' OR "telegram_id" = '{{ ($json.id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING *

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO statistik_pegawai (
    pegawai_id, 
    instansi_id, 
    total_masuk, 
    total_pulang, 
    total_terlambat, 
    total_lebih_awal,
    akum_menit_terlambat,
    akum_menit_lebih_awal,
    total_izin, 
    total_sakit, 
    total_tubel,
    updated_at
)
SELECT 
    '{{ ($json.payload.ID).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'bapperida',
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" IN ('MASUK', 'DI LUAR JAM MASUK')),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" IN ('PULANG', 'DI LUAR JAM PULANG', 'PULANG LUAR')),
    
    -- total_terlambat: Menghitung keterlambatan reguler + TANPA BERITA
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
        WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'DI LUAR JAM MASUK' 
        OR ("Jenis Absen" = 'MASUK' AND "Jam"::time > '07:15:00')
        OR "Jenis Absen" = 'TANPA BERITA'
    ),
    
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
        WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'DI LUAR JAM PULANG' 
        OR ("Jenis Absen" = 'PULANG' AND "Jam"::time < '14:30:00')
    ),
    
    -- akum_menit_terlambat: Menit reguler + 450 menit (7.5 jam) per hari TANPA BERITA
    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN "Jenis Absen" = 'TANPA BERITA' THEN 450
            
            WHEN "Jenis Absen" IN ('MASUK', 'DI LUAR JAM MASUK') AND "Jam"::time > '07:15:00'
            THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ("Jam"::time - '07:15:00')) / 60
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0)::integer,

    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN "Jenis Absen" IN ('PULANG', 'DI LUAR JAM PULANG') AND "Jam"::time < '14:30:00'
            THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ('14:30:00'::time - "Jam"::time)) / 60
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0)::integer,

    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'IZIN'),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'SAKIT'),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'TUBEL'),
    NOW()
FROM "Log_Absen"
WHERE "ID" = '{{ ($json.payload.ID).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
ON CONFLICT (pegawai_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
    total_masuk = EXCLUDED.total_masuk,
    total_pulang = EXCLUDED.total_pulang,
    total_terlambat = EXCLUDED.total_terlambat,
    total_lebih_awal = EXCLUDED.total_lebih_awal,
    akum_menit_terlambat = EXCLUDED.akum_menit_terlambat,
    akum_menit_lebih_awal = EXCLUDED.akum_menit_lebih_awal,
    total_izin = EXCLUDED.total_izin,
    total_sakit = EXCLUDED.total_sakit,
    total_tubel = EXCLUDED.total_tubel,
    updated_at = NOW();
SELECT * FROM instansi_list ORDER BY nama_instansi ASC
SELECT * FROM bidang_list WHERE instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id || "bapperida").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT "id", "username", "NIP", "Jabatan", "Status", "no", "bidang", "pangkat", "nomorhp", "role", "is_admin", "instansi_id"
FROM "user_list"
WHERE UPPER("role") NOT IN ('USER') 
   OR "is_admin" = true 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%KEPALA%' 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%SEKRETARIS%' 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%KABID%' 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%IRBAN%'
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%INSPEKTUR%'
ORDER BY "no" ASC NULLS LAST;

WITH RankedUsers AS (
  SELECT 
    id, 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY instansi_id 
      ORDER BY 
        CASE 
          WHEN UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KEPALA DINAS%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KEPALA BADAN%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%INSPEKTUR%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) = 'KEPALA' THEN 100
          WHEN UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%SEKRETARIS%' THEN 90
          WHEN UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KEPALA BIDANG%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KABID%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%IRBAN%' THEN 80
          WHEN UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KASUBAG%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KASUBBID%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KETUA TIM%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%KOORDINATOR%' THEN 70
          WHEN UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%NON ASN%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%HONORER%' OR UPPER(TRIM("Jabatan")) LIKE '%THL%' THEN 40
          ELSE 50 
        END DESC,
        CASE 
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%IV/E%' THEN 17
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%IV/D%' THEN 16
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%IV/C%' THEN 15
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%IV/B%' THEN 14
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%IV/A%' THEN 13
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%III/D%' THEN 12
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%III/C%' THEN 11
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%III/B%' THEN 10
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%III/A%' THEN 9
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%II/D%' THEN 8
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%II/C%' THEN 7
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%II/B%' THEN 6
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%II/A%' THEN 5
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%I/D%' THEN 4
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%I/C%' THEN 3
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%I/B%' THEN 2
          WHEN UPPER(pangkat) LIKE '%I/A%' THEN 1
          ELSE 0 
        END DESC,
        SUBSTRING("NIP" FROM 1 FOR 8) ASC,
        id ASC
    ) as new_no
  FROM user_list
  WHERE instansi_id = '{{ ($json.instansi_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
UPDATE user_list
SET no = RankedUsers.new_no
FROM RankedUsers
WHERE user_list.id = RankedUsers.id 
  AND user_list.no IS DISTINCT FROM RankedUsers.new_no;
